requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——SNI CISPR对标排放标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——SNI CISPR對標排放標準

summary.en: Wireless and electronic devices sold in Indonesia must comply with applicable SNI (Standar Nasional Indonesia) EMC standards for radiated and conducted emission limits. SNI standards are adopted by BSN (Badan Standardisasi Nasional) and largely align with CISPR/IEC international standards. The primary EMC references for IT, multimedia, and consumer electronics are SNI CISPR 32 (Multimedia equipment — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement, adopted from CISPR 32) and SNI CISPR 35 (Multimedia equipment — Immunity characteristics). Legacy SNI CISPR 22 may still be cited for older device categories. Testing must be conducted at SDPPI-accredited or BSN-recognised laboratories. EMC compliance evidence is submitted as part of the SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat application — there is no self-declaration route equivalent to CE Declaration of Conformity for Indonesia. SDPPI may also reference ETSI or IEC standards where SNI adoption is incomplete.
summary.zh: 在印度尼西亚销售的无线及电子设备须符合适用的SNI（印度尼西亚国家标准）EMC标准，涵盖辐射及传导排放限值。SNI标准由BSN（国家标准化局）采纳，总体与CISPR/IEC国际标准一致。信息技术、多媒体及消费电子产品的主要EMC参考标准为SNI CISPR 32（多媒体设备——电磁骚扰特性——限值与测量方法，采纳自CISPR 32）及SNI CISPR 35（多媒体设备——抗扰度特性）。旧版SNI CISPR 22在部分老产品类别中仍可引用。测试须在SDPPI认可或BSN认可的实验室进行。EMC合规证明作为SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申请的一部分提交——印度尼西亚不存在类似CE符合性声明的自我声明路径。在SNI采纳尚不完整的领域，SDPPI亦可参考ETSI或IEC标准。
summary.zht: 在印度尼西亞銷售的無線及電子設備須符合適用的SNI（印度尼西亞國家標準）EMC標準，涵蓋輻射及傳導排放限值。SNI標準由BSN（國家標準化局）採納，總體與CISPR/IEC國際標準一致。資訊技術、多媒體及消費電子產品的主要EMC參考標準為SNI CISPR 32（多媒體設備——電磁騷擾特性——限值與測量方法，採納自CISPR 32）及SNI CISPR 35（多媒體設備——抗擾度特性）。舊版SNI CISPR 22在部分老產品類別中仍可引用。測試須在SDPPI認可或BSN認可的實驗室進行。EMC合規證明作為SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申請的一部分提交——印度尼西亞不存在類似CE符合性聲明的自我聲明路徑。在SNI採納尚不完整的領域，SDPPI亦可參考ETSI或IEC標準。

standards_or_laws: SNI CISPR 32:2016 — Multimedia equipment: Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (adopted from CISPR 32:2015, BSN)
SNI CISPR 35:2017 — Multimedia equipment: Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (BSN)
SNI CISPR 22 — Information technology equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics (legacy, partially superseded by CISPR 32)
Peraturan Menteri Kominfo No. 16 Tahun 2018 — SDPPI type approval requiring EMC test evidence submission

summary.en: China's EMC framework for electronics uses GB/T 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics, aligned with CISPR 22/32) for emissions and GB 17625.1 (aligned with IEC 61000-3-2) for harmonic current emissions. Products in scope of CCC must include EMC compliance tested at CNCA-designated, CNAS-accredited laboratories. GB/T 9254 test reports and CCC EMC certificates are not accepted in Indonesia. While the CISPR technical lineage of SNI and GB/T standards is broadly similar, the certification processes, accreditation bodies, and administrative requirements are entirely separate frameworks.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品EMC框架采用GB/T 9254（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性，与CISPR 22/32接轨）处理辐射排放，GB 17625.1（与IEC 61000-3-2接轨）处理谐波电流排放。纳入CCC强制认证范围的产品须在CNCA指定、CNAS认可的实验室完成EMC合规测试。GB/T 9254测试报告及CCC EMC证书不被印度尼西亚接受。SNI与GB/T标准均源自CISPR技术体系，技术内容大体相近，但认证程序、认可机构及行政要求完全独立。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品EMC框架採用GB/T 9254（資訊技術設備無線電騷擾特性，與CISPR 22/32接軌）處理輻射排放，GB 17625.1（與IEC 61000-3-2接軌）處理諧波電流排放。納入CCC強制認證範圍的產品須在CNCA指定、CNAS認可的實驗室完成EMC合規測試。GB/T 9254測試報告及CCC EMC證書不被印度尼西亞接受。SNI與GB/T標準均源自CISPR技術體系，技術內容大體相近，但認證程序、認可機構及行政要求完全獨立。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics (aligned with CISPR 22/32, SAC/MIIT)
GB 17625.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits — Harmonic current emissions (aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) EMC requirements under CNCA — tested at CNCA-designated CNAS-accredited laboratories

gap.en: SNI CISPR-aligned EMC requirements in Indonesia are technically similar to GB/T 9254 (both derived from CISPR 32), but no administrative equivalence or MRA exists. SDPPI requires EMC test reports from SDPPI-accredited or BSN-authorised laboratories; Chinese CNAS reports are not directly accepted without review by an Indonesian-recognised body. There is no self-declaration route: EMC compliance evidence must be submitted within the SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat application. Common gap: exporters assume CISPR technical alignment means test data are interchangeable — they are not; fresh testing or accredited laboratory review in Indonesia is required for each device model.
gap.zh: 印度尼西亚SNI CISPR对标EMC要求在技术内容上与GB/T 9254相近（均源自CISPR 32），但不存在行政等效认可或相互认可协定。SDPPI要求EMC测试报告来自SDPPI认可或BSN授权实验室；中国CNAS报告未经印度尼西亚认可机构审核不被直接接受。不存在自我声明路径：EMC合规证明须作为SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申请的组成部分提交。常见差距：出口商误认为CISPR技术对标意味着测试数据可互换——实则不然；每款设备型号均须在印度尼西亚进行重新测试或经认可实验室审核。
gap.zht: 印度尼西亞SNI CISPR對標EMC要求在技術內容上與GB/T 9254相近（均源自CISPR 32），但不存在行政等效認可或相互認可協定。SDPPI要求EMC測試報告來自SDPPI認可或BSN授權實驗室；中國CNAS報告未經印度尼西亞認可機構審核不被直接接受。不存在自我聲明路徑：EMC合規證明須作為SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申請的組成部分提交。常見差距：出口商誤認為CISPR技術對標意味著測試數據可互換——實則不然；每款設備型號均須在印度尼西亞進行重新測試或經認可實驗室審核。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SNI CISPR-aligned EMC compliance required as part of SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat; testing at SDPPI-accredited or BSN-recognised laboratory required; no self-declaration route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for CCC-scope products) or voluntary GB/T self-declaration — GB/T 9254 / GB 17625.1 EMC compliance under SAC/CNCA framework; CNAS-accredited laboratory testing required for CCC

source.publisher: BSN (Badan Standardisasi Nasional) — SNI CISPR 32 / SNI CISPR 35

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SNI CISPR-aligned EMC compliance is mandatory in Indonesia as part of the SDPPI type approval process. While the technical standards share CISPR lineage with Chinese GB/T 9254, Chinese CNAS test reports and CCC EMC certificates are not accepted. Testing or accredited-laboratory data review at an SDPPI-accredited facility is required per device model. No self-declaration route exists.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SNI CISPR对标EMC合规是印度尼西亚SDPPI型号认证程序的强制要求。尽管相关技术标准与中国GB/T 9254同源于CISPR，但中国CNAS测试报告及CCC EMC证书不被接受。每款设备型号须在SDPPI认可机构进行测试或经认可实验室数据审核。不存在自我声明路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SNI CISPR對標EMC合規是印度尼西亞SDPPI型號認證程序的強制要求。儘管相關技術標準與中國GB/T 9254同源於CISPR，但中國CNAS測試報告及CCC EMC證書不被接受。每款設備型號須在SDPPI認可機構進行測試或經認可實驗室數據審核。不存在自我聲明路徑。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Performance and Frequency Use — SDPPI Persyaratan Teknis (Technical Requirements)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电性能与频率使用——SDPPI Persyaratan Teknis（技术要求）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電性能與頻率使用——SDPPI Persyaratan Teknis（技術要求）

summary.en: All radio-frequency transmitting devices sold in Indonesia must comply with SDPPI persyaratan teknis (technical requirements) specifying permitted frequency bands, maximum transmit power (EIRP), channel plans, spurious emission limits, and — for 5 GHz WLAN — mandatory Dynamic Frequency Selection (DFS) and Transmit Power Control (TPC). SDPPI publishes separate persyaratan teknis for each device category: 2.4 GHz WLAN, 5 GHz WLAN, Bluetooth / BLE, cellular bands, and other unlicensed IoT bands (including 433 MHz and 915 MHz where applicable). The 2.4 GHz WLAN band in Indonesia is 2400–2483.5 MHz with a maximum EIRP of 100 mW (20 dBm). The 5 GHz WLAN bands and DFS requirements follow ITU Radio Regulations but are independently enforced by SDPPI. Radio performance testing is a mandatory component of the SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat application and must be conducted at SDPPI-accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: 在印度尼西亚销售的所有射频发射设备须符合SDPPI persyaratan teknis（技术要求），规定许可频段、最大发射功率（EIRP）、信道方案、杂散辐射限值，以及5 GHz WLAN强制动态频率选择（DFS）和发射功率控制（TPC）要求。SDPPI针对每类设备发布独立persyaratan teknis：2.4 GHz WLAN、5 GHz WLAN、蓝牙/BLE、蜂窝频段及其他非授权物联网频段（包括433 MHz和915 MHz，视适用情况而定）。印度尼西亚2.4 GHz WLAN频段为2400–2483.5 MHz，最大EIRP为100 mW（20 dBm）。5 GHz WLAN频段及DFS要求遵循ITU无线电规则，但由SDPPI独立执行。无线电性能测试是SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申请的强制组成部分，须在SDPPI认可实验室进行。
summary.zht: 在印度尼西亞銷售的所有射頻發射設備須符合SDPPI persyaratan teknis（技術要求），規定許可頻段、最大發射功率（EIRP）、信道方案、雜散輻射限值，以及5 GHz WLAN強制動態頻率選擇（DFS）和發射功率控制（TPC）要求。SDPPI針對每類設備發布獨立persyaratan teknis：2.4 GHz WLAN、5 GHz WLAN、藍牙/BLE、蜂窩頻段及其他非授權物聯網頻段（包括433 MHz和915 MHz，視適用情況而定）。印度尼西亞2.4 GHz WLAN頻段為2400–2483.5 MHz，最大EIRP為100 mW（20 dBm）。5 GHz WLAN頻段及DFS要求遵循ITU無線電規則，但由SDPPI獨立執行。無線電性能測試是SDPPI sertifikasi perangkat申請的強制組成部分，須在SDPPI認可實驗室進行。

standards_or_laws: Peraturan Menteri Kominfo No. 7 Tahun 2021 tentang Penggunaan Spektrum Frekuensi Radio (Radio Frequency Spectrum Use Regulation 2021)
Peraturan Menteri Kominfo No. 2 Tahun 2021 tentang Rencana Induk Penggunaan Spektrum Frekuensi Radio (National Radio Frequency Spectrum Master Plan 2021)
SDPPI Persyaratan Teknis Perangkat Telekomunikasi — per-category technical requirements published on sdppi.kominfo.go.id (covering WLAN 2.4 GHz, WLAN 5 GHz, Bluetooth, cellular, IoT)
ITU Radio Regulations — referenced by SDPPI for band allocation alignment

summary.en: Chinese radio frequency type approval (SRRC, administered by MIIT / State Radio Regulation of China) mandates permitted frequency bands, transmit power limits, and spurious emission requirements per GB/T and YD/T standards for each device category. SRRC approval is mandatory for all radio transmitting devices sold or imported into China. China's 5 GHz WLAN permissions and DFS requirements are defined under the SRRC framework (aligned with ETSI in many respects). Chinese SRRC approval and the underlying YD/T / GB/T radio performance standards are not recognised by Indonesian SDPPI.
summary.zh: 中国射频型号核准（SRRC，由MIIT/国家无线电管理局主管）依据各类设备的GB/T及YD/T标准，规定许可频段、发射功率限值及杂散辐射要求。SRRC批准对所有在中国境内销售或进口的无线发射设备均为强制要求。中国5 GHz WLAN权限及DFS要求在SRRC框架内规定（在许多方面与ETSI接轨）。中国SRRC批准及其依据的YD/T / GB/T无线电性能标准不被印度尼西亚SDPPI承认。
summary.zht: 中國射頻型號核准（SRRC，由MIIT/國家無線電管理局主管）依據各類設備的GB/T及YD/T標準，規定許可頻段、發射功率限值及雜散輻射要求。SRRC批准對所有在中國境內銷售或進口的無線發射設備均為強制要求。中國5 GHz WLAN權限及DFS要求在SRRC框架內規定（在許多方面與ETSI接軌）。中國SRRC批准及其依據的YD/T / GB/T無線電性能標準不被印度尼西亞SDPPI承認。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) radio type approval — MIIT, under Regulations of the People's Republic of China on the Administration of Radio Frequencies
YD/T technical standards for terminal equipment radio performance (MIIT / CAICT)
GB/T radio disturbance and performance standards applicable to wireless devices

gap.en: Chinese SRRC radio performance approval and frequency allocation are not recognised by Indonesian SDPPI. While both China and Indonesia broadly follow ITU Radio Regulations, specific frequency band allocations, maximum transmit power limits, permitted DFS channels for 5 GHz, and channel plans may differ between the two markets. The specific SDPPI persyaratan teknis for each device category must be met and verified by testing at an SDPPI-accredited laboratory. Common gap: 5 GHz devices with SRRC or CE approval may not have been tested against all DFS channels required by SDPPI, requiring additional testing. Devices transmitting in bands outside SDPPI-permitted allocations will be refused type approval.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC无线电性能批准及频率分配不被印度尼西亚SDPPI承认。尽管中国与印度尼西亚大体遵循ITU无线电规则，但两市场的具体频段分配、最大发射功率限值、5 GHz许可DFS信道及信道方案可能存在差异。每类设备的SDPPI persyaratan teknis须经SDPPI认可实验室测试验证。常见差距：持有SRRC或CE批准的5 GHz设备可能未针对SDPPI要求的所有DFS信道进行测试，需补充测试。在SDPPI许可频段以外发射的设备将被拒绝型号认证。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC無線電性能批准及頻率分配不被印度尼西亞SDPPI承認。儘管中國與印度尼西亞大體遵循ITU無線電規則，但兩市場的具體頻段分配、最大發射功率限值、5 GHz許可DFS信道及信道方案可能存在差異。每類設備的SDPPI persyaratan teknis須經SDPPI認可實驗室測試驗證。常見差距：持有SRRC或CE批准的5 GHz設備可能未針對SDPPI要求的所有DFS信道進行測試，需補充測試。在SDPPI許可頻段以外發射的設備將被拒絕型號認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SDPPI persyaratan teknis radio performance compliance required per device category; DFS and TPC mandatory for 5 GHz WLAN; testing at SDPPI-accredited laboratory required as part of sertifikasi perangkat
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT) type approval required for all radio transmitting devices; GB/T and YD/T technical standards apply per device category

source.publisher: SDPPI (Ditjen Sumber Daya dan Perangkat Pos dan Informatika) — Persyaratan Teknis Perangkat

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SDPPI radio performance compliance (persyaratan teknis) is mandatory for all wireless devices as part of the sertifikasi perangkat process. Chinese SRRC approvals are not recognised. SDPPI-specific technical requirements per device category govern permitted bands, transmit power limits, and 5 GHz DFS/TPC mandates. Testing must be conducted at an SDPPI-accredited laboratory for each device model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SDPPI无线电性能合规（persyaratan teknis）是所有无线设备sertifikasi perangkat程序的强制要求。中国SRRC批准不被承认。每类设备的SDPPI专项技术要求规定许可频段、发射功率限值及5 GHz DFS/TPC强制要求。每款设备型号须在SDPPI认可实验室进行测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SDPPI無線電性能合規（persyaratan teknis）是所有無線設備sertifikasi perangkat程序的強制要求。中國SRRC批准不被承認。每類設備的SDPPI專項技術要求規定許可頻段、發射功率限值及5 GHz DFS/TPC強制要求。每款設備型號須在SDPPI認可實驗室進行測試。
